title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 9.270 - Posttraumatic stress awareness day designated
text:
9.270.  Posttraumatic stress awareness day designated. — June twenty-seventh of each year shall be known and designated as "Posttraumatic Stress Awareness Day".  It is recommended to the people of the state that the day be appropriately observed through activities which will increase awareness of posttraumatic stress.
(L. 2018 S.B. 660)
